1001000000111001 1100011010001110 1 -> sum: 0101011011001000, cout: 1
1010001010111000 0000111101110110 1 -> sum: 1011001000101111, cout: 0
0011001110011110 0011101010011111 0 -> sum: 0110111000111101, cout: 0
0010001111110000 0101101011101111 1 -> sum: 0111111011100000, cout: 0
1101101000011000 1010000100100100 1 -> sum: 0111101100111101, cout: 1
1101101011111101 0110011100011010 0 -> sum: 0100001000010111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000000 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
